title: Fix chicken taco image and restore salsa/chips and quesadilla images

requirements.text: Replace the current chicken taco images in the MenuSection with correct images that clearly show chicken tacos (with visible grilled/seasoned chicken as the filling). The images must look authentic and appetizing.

quotes: The chicken tacos are not of images of chicken, so make sure to have that as chicken tacos

acceptanceCriteria: The chicken taco menu card displays an image that clearly shows chicken tacos with chicken as the primary visible filling
The image is distinct from beef/street taco imagery used elsewhere on the site

requirements.text: Restore the salsa and chips menu item image in the MenuSection. This image was present in a previous version (live version) and must be brought back to the chips & salsa menu card.

quotes: I need the image back of the salsa chips

acceptanceCriteria: The chips & salsa menu card displays an appealing image of salsa and tortilla chips
The image is visible and properly sized within the menu card grid

requirements.text: Restore the quesadilla menu item image in the MenuSection. This image was present in a previous version (live version) and must be brought back to the quesadilla menu card.
acceptanceCriteria: The quesadilla menu card displays an appealing image of a quesadilla
The image is visible and properly sized within the menu card grid

requirements.text: Retain the new catering section banner image (the enlarged catering picture with the woman) at the bottom of the website in CateringSection. Do not revert or replace this image.

quotes: leave the new catering picture at the bottom of the website

acceptanceCriteria: The CateringSection at the bottom of the page continues to display the new catering banner image introduced in Version 19
The increased height classes (h-96 sm:h-[32rem]) on the banner image container remain unchanged

constraints: Do not modify or revert the catering section banner image introduced in Version 19
Restore only the specific missing/incorrect images; do not alter other menu item images (e.g., burrito, street taco)
nonGoals: Redesigning the MenuSection layout or card structure
Changing menu item descriptions or ingredient details
Modifying any section other than the menu item images and retaining the catering banner

required: Authentic Mexican chicken tacos with visible grilled seasoned chicken, fresh cilantro, diced onion, lime wedge, on corn tortillas, warm natural lighting (chicken-tacos.dim_800x600.png)
Mexican-style chips and salsa — crispy tortilla chips in a basket alongside a bowl of vibrant red salsa, garnished with cilantro, rustic wood or tile surface (chips-salsa.dim_800x600.png)
Golden crispy quesadilla cut into wedges showing melted cheese and chicken filling, served on a wooden board with sour cream and salsa dipping sides, warm lighting (quesadilla.dim_800x600.png)
